inspire.en: Immediately after resolving a Ploy that picked a friendly fighter, Inspire that fighter.

trigger.en: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter adjacent to any friendly fighters is picked to use a Core ability.

rulesText.en: Push that fighter 1 hex. You can only use this ability once per game.

trigger.en: Use this immediately after a friendly fighter adjacent to any friendly fighters is picked to use a Core ability.

flavorText.en: A Skaven must always be on their guard. Especially when around other Skaven.

rulesText.en: Give that fighter a Guard token. You can only use this ability once per game.

Pick a friendly leader ({icon:leader}) to use this ability. Pick a slain friendly minion ({icon:minion}). Raise that fighter and place them on an empty starting hex then give that fighter a Raise token.
Friendly schemers' ({icon:destined}) melee weapons have Grievous ({icon:grievous}) while the target is Flanked or Surrounded.
While a friendly Skritch is slain, Krrk is a leader ({icon:leader}).

flavorText.en: Skritch and his more useful minions are well-versed in getting themselves out of danger, and into the best position.

rulesText.en: Use this in your Power step. Pick a friendly fighter and another fighter that is adjacent to them. Remove those fighters from the battlefield and then place each in the hex the other was removed from. You can only use this ability once per game.
